architecture.active_note: top_k=10 of 512 experts per token + 1 shared expert + per-layer attention -> ~17B active (A17B).

hybrid_layer_map.pattern: 3x linear_attention then 1x full_attention (interval 4); all layers are MoE (mlp_only_layers=[]).

architecture.total_params_nominal: ~397B (A17B active: top-10 of 512 experts + shared expert + attention)

condensation_frontier.doctrine: carry the sealed Gate-F candidate set forward: full-rank PQ base + protected islands (mlp2/down) / PQ-Doctor-lowrank residual (mlp1/up); router + attention + embed/head + vision + MTP stay source-native. Capability-gated; the 120B science is NEGATIVE at uniform sub-bit, so promotion requires a real-forward capability pass on 397B, not a proxy.

organs.geometry: 512 experts x {gate,up,down}_proj, moe_intermediate=1024, hidden=4096, per layer x 60 layers
organs.note: exact tensor prefix to be confirmed against the resident index.json at admission (patterns follow qwen3_moe convention).
organs.rationale: 512-expert MoE stacks are ~the entire parameter budget; this is the only organ where sub-bit representation search can move the whole-artifact BPW. Apply the sealed Gate-F candidate doctrine (full-rank PQ base + protected islands / Doctor residual), per-tensor-class, capability-gated.
always-on path; capability-sensitive relative to its small size.
expert selection is discrete and brittle; tiny param share, high leverage.

organs.geometry: GQA heads=32/2, head_dim=256, partial_rotary=0.25, rope_theta=10000000, mrope [11, 11, 10] interleaved; 15 layers
organs.rationale: the 15 global-attention layers carry long-range routing of the hybrid; small share, protect first.

organs.analytic_note: ESTIMATE (conv/gate/beta terms approximated from geometry; exact bytes require the resident safetensors headers).
organs.geometry: Gated DeltaNet: key_heads=16 x key_dim=128, value_heads=64 x value_dim=128, short_conv k=4, output_gate=True, ssm_dtype=float32
organs.rationale: recurrent linear-attention state is float32 and error-accumulating over sequence; sub-bit here risks state drift. Protect until dedicated evidence.
vocab 248320 is large; embedding/head quality is capability-critical.

organs.analytic_note: ESTIMATE (block-level approximation; excludes patch embed + norm bias).
organs.geometry: ViT depth=27, hidden=1152, patch=16, spatial_merge=2, out_hidden=4096 (projects into text hidden 4096)
organs.rationale: multimodal projector + ViT are out of the text-BPW objective; keep native.
MTP is a speculative-decode accelerator head; keep native, optional at serve.

resolution_method: config.json (text_config + vision_config) fetched as metadata; analytic param counts computed from geometry.
risks: Gated-DeltaNet linear-attention state (float32 ssm) is error-accumulating; treat as protected until dedicated per-organ evidence.
Router (top-10 of 512) is high-leverage / tiny; never sub-bit.
Multimodal: vision encoder + projector are out of the text-BPW scope but must remain loadable for the model to run; do not touch.
Tensor name prefixes are convention-inferred; confirm against the resident model.safetensors.index.json weight_map before any transform.
status: DRAFT (organ map from live config; PREP-ONLY, no weights resident)
